description_long: This is a high-top athletic soccer cleat featuring a dynamic color gradient from black at the heel to a vibrant red at the toe, with white angular stripes on the side. The upper is constructed from a synthetic material with a textured, grippy surface at the forefoot, designed for enhanced ball control. The shoe has a sock-like collar for ankle support and a traditional lacing system for a secure fit. The outsole is equipped with multiple conical studs, optimized for traction on grass or turf surfaces. The interior likely contains a cushioned insole for comfort and shock absorption. The overall design is sleek and modern, with branding elements and a focus on performance.
description: A modern, high-top soccer cleat with a black-to-red gradient, white stripes, and textured forefoot for grip. Features a sock-like collar, laces, and studded sole for traction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white angular stripes, black upper, and red textured forefoot with visible studs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing system, sock-like collar, and the grippy, textured red forefoot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth black upper, red forefoot, and studded sole without branding.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the black heel, red collar accent, and the back of the studded sole.
attribute_logo: Three white parallel stripes on the outer side of the shoe
